pre_game.message: Hey, I'm G — nice to meet you. How are you feeling about the game, and what brought you here?
Nice to meet you, G. I'm a bit nervous but determined — I came to win money to help my family and the people I care about.
I hear you — I'm here to win for my people too. Who are you looking to help, and have you thought about a strategy?
I'm trying to help my mom and younger siblings; plan is to build trust and alliances early, read people's moves carefully, cooperate when it benefits us, and be ready to act decisively at the end.
I’m with you — same goal. Sounds like a solid plan; I’m open to an alliance and sharing info. Want to team up?
Yes—let’s team up. I’ll share info and coordinate moves; let’s stick together early and agree on a simple signal for trust. Sound good?
Sounds great — I’m in. Let’s coordinate and use two short taps on the table as our trust signal; I’ll share info and expect the same.
Two taps it is — I'll use it. I’ll share important info and watch your back; let’s stay flexible.
Thanks — I’ve got your back. I’ll use the two taps too; I’ll share info and adapt as needed.
Appreciate it — glad we're aligned. Let’s keep sharing intel, watch each other’s moves, and use the taps when needed.
Agreed — let’s trade observations, flag suspicious moves, use the two taps when needed, and I’ll warn you if anyone seems off. Good luck.
Thanks — I’ve got your back too. I’ll stay vigilant; let me know if you spot anything suspicious. Good luck.
Thanks — I’ll do the same. I’ll tap if I see anything off; appreciate you watching my back.
Appreciate it — I’ll stay sharp and trust the taps; let’s keep watching each other and share anything suspicious.
Right on — I’ve got you; two taps when needed, I’ll call out anything suspicious.
Thanks — I appreciate it. Two taps if anything feels off; I’ll watch your back like you’ll watch mine. Good luck.
